description: LLM sets up a gate with retry loop — agent self-heals from gate failure context

criteria.name: gate_present
criteria.pass_condition: Script includes gate: on a registerPhase call.

criteria.name: maxIterations_set
criteria.description: maxIterations is configured on the gated phase
criteria.pass_condition: Script includes maxIterations: on the gated phase (likely 3).

criteria.name: gate_logic_correct
criteria.description: Gate checks for both 'hello' and 'world' in output
criteria.pass_condition: The gate function checks for both words in the agent output.

criteria.name: workflow_completed
criteria.pass_condition: Output shows 'Workflow ... completed'. Gate didn't exhaust (no __phaseMeta).

criteria.name: confirmation_phase
criteria.description: Second phase confirms the greeting passed validation
criteria.pass_condition: Script has a second phase that receives the greeting and confirms it.

criteria.name: correct_registerPhase_usage
criteria.description: Uses registerPhase DSL, not bare phase() calls
